one_time_description: Fishing licenses capitalized at cost ($1,200,000 acquired in year) rather than expensed, constituting a departure from PSAS; annual surplus overstated by $1,200,000
economic_notes: Band operates Taqamkuk Development Corporation, Netukulimk Fisheries Ltd., and Harbour Authority as consolidated subsidiaries. Economic activities include cannabis, building supplies, garage, gas bar, wholesalers, air charter, arts and crafts, commercial fisheries, and outfitters.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED: fishing licenses capitalized as intangible assets ($10,237,825 on balance sheet) contrary to PSAS; assets overstated by $10,237,825, opening surplus overstated by $9,037,825, annual surplus overstated by $1,200,000. Consolidated entity includes Taqamkuk Development Corporation, Netukulimk Fisheries Ltd., and Harbour Authority. Demand loans of $5,017,054 secured by fishing licences and properties. Demand promissory notes with fish buyers secured by fishing licences. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event with unknown financial impact. Pension contributions of $246,750 paid in year. No schedule of remuneration provided. Prior year amounts not received from ISC of $5,516,185 included in receivables.
